.. py:class:: shortestPathModel(grid: tuple[int, int])

   Bases: :py:obj:`pyepo.model.mpax.mpaxmodel.optMpaxModel`


   This class is an optimization model for the shortest path problem

   :ivar grid: Size of grid network
   :vartype grid: tuple of int
   :ivar arcs: List of arcs

   :vartype arcs: list
